name: countdown
description: Calculate days/hours until a target date or between two dates
command: python3 -c "from datetime import datetime; t=datetime.strptime('{{target_date}}','%Y-%m-%d'); n=datetime.now(); d=t-n; print(f'Target: {{target_date}}'); print(f'Now: {n.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\")}'); print(f'Days remaining: {d.days}'); print(f'Hours remaining: {d.total_seconds()/3600:.1f}'); print(f'Status: {\"PAST\" if d.total_seconds()<0 else \"FUTURE\"}')"
